3f8fa2d0608b9dec3e99","dweb:/ipfs/QmTBExeX2SDTkn5xbk5ssbYSx7VqRp9H4Ux1CY4uQM4b9N"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/ERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2d9dc2fe26180f74c11c13663647d38e259e45f95eb88f57b61d2160b0109d3e","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://81233d1f98060113d9922180bb0f14f8335856fe9f339134b09335e9f678c377","dweb:/ipfs/QmWh6R35SarhAn4z2wH8SU456jJSYL2FgucfTFgbHJJN4E"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/staking/RewardsDistributor.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa03cd717cfc0447c2a340567cfc295a0b0da692bba471b33980aa2ad48a54e26","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f27bd4f469a701a939f6dd66ba0d7aba118f28e761864a96d7973635df8a18a4","dweb:/ipfs/QmR1dzUaqHHYL9ZwHS9TW921xPG6QZ2LyUh5KEd5Wifh7u"]}},"version":1}

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

pause().details: Functions guarded by `whenNotPaused` will revert while the contract is paused.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

MIN_INITIAL_DEPOSIT().notice: Minimum first deposit to prevent first-depositor griefing

MIN_NOTIFY().notice: Minimum amount per notifyReward to avoid precision loss and notify spam

MIN_PENALTY_FLUSH().notice: Minimum penalty flush amount to avoid dust rounding

accRewardPerShare().notice: Global accumulated rewards per share, scaled by 1e18

addPendingPenalty(uint256).notice: Receives K613 penalty from Staking; adds to pending penalties. K613 is staked to xK613 on next claim/advanceEpoch to avoid reentrancy (Staking calls this).

advanceEpoch().notice: Advances the epoch: flushes pending rewards/penalties. Always advances the epoch marker.

balanceOf(address).notice: The amount of stakingToken (xK613) held by a user

claim().notice: Claims accumulated rewards. Reverts while caller has an active exit vesting in Staking (withdraw from RD first, then exit; no claim during vesting).

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposits xK613 to earn rewards. Caller must approve this contract first

epochDuration().notice: Epoch duration in seconds. Penalties flush at epoch boundary even if below threshold

k613().notice: K613 token; used to stake penalty K613 in Staking to get xK613 for distribution

lastEpochFlushAt().notice: Timestamp when penalties were last flushed at epoch boundary

nextEpochAt().notice: Returns the timestamp when the current epoch ends (or 0 if no epochs).

notifyReward(uint256).notice: Notifies new rewards in xK613. Caller must have transferred rewardToken (xK613) to this contract first.

pendingPenalties().notice: Penalties from instant exit; flushed when >= MIN_PENALTY_FLUSH to avoid dust rounding

pendingRewards().notice: Rewards notified but not yet distributed (when totalDeposits was 0)

pendingRewardsOf(address).notice: Returns pending rewards for an account.

rewardToken().notice: Reward token (xK613): rewards are paid out in xK613. Same token as stakingToken

setStaking(address).notice: Sets the staking contract. Grants REWARDS_NOTIFIER_ROLE for penalty rewards. Pass address(0) to disable.

staking().notice: Staking contract; receives REWARDS_NOTIFIER_ROLE for penalty rewards

stakingToken().notice: Staking token (xK613): users deposit this to earn rewards

totalDeposits().notice: Total stakingToken (xK613) deposited by all users

unpause().notice: Unpauses the contract, re-enabling state-changing operations.

userPendingRewards(address).notice: The amount of rewards pending for a user

userRewardDebt(address).notice: The amount of rewards owed to a user

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraws xK613. Must withdraw from RD before initiating exit in Staking.
